allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Orders: {len\(d\)}, first status: {d[0][\\"trang_thai\\"] if d else \\"none\\"}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('kpi keys:', list\(d.get\('kpi',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); kpi = d.get\('kpi',{}\); print\('kpi keys:', list\(kpi.keys\(\)\)\); print\('giaoThatBai:', kpi.get\('giaoThatBai'\)\); print\('doiTra:', kpi.get\('doiTra'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); kpi = d.get\('kpi',{}\); print\('kpi keys:', list\(kpi.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:3000]\)")
